findings.description: The statement 'アプリケーションプログラマは、JSP、JSTL及び本機能を使用してWebアプリケーションの画面を作成する。' is absent from the knowledge file. This identifies the target user role (application programmer) and the tools used alongside this feature (JSP, JSTL), which provides useful context for AI to answer questions about usage prerequisites and tool combinations.
findings.source_evidence: アプリケーションプログラマは、JSP、JSTL及び本機能を使用してWebアプリケーションの画面を作成する。

findings.description: The source 要求 h2 section contains four h3 subsections (実装済み, 未実装, 未検討, 取り下げ) and its plain text substantially exceeds 2000 characters (16+ 実装済み items, 2 未実装, 14+ 未検討, 1 取り下げ with explanation). Per V3 rules, an h2 with >= 2000 chars and existing h3s should be split into separate knowledge sections, but all four subsections are merged into a single s3.
findings.source_evidence: 実装済み / 未実装 / 未検討 / 取り下げ — four distinct h3 headings under 要求 h2, with combined content well exceeding 2000 characters.
